title: Meeting Grief with Steadiness
description: Companionship for heavy hearts — emotional freedom without numbness, and release of clinging.
entry_queries: how do I live with loss

steps.practice: In the next mood swing, delay reaction by ninety seconds.
steps.reflection: Which emotion currently has the authority to drive my decisions?

steps.practice: Notice one "mine" thought today and soften it: this is entrusted, not owned.
steps.reflection: Where is "I / mine" creating unnecessary tension?

steps.practice: When good news or bad news hits, name the feeling — then take one steady next action without amplifying it.
steps.reflection: Which outcomes am I still using as proof that I am worthy — or unworthy?
